speciesList: PREFIX nubbekg: <http://nubbekg.aksw.org/ontology#> PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> PREFIX skos: <http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#> SELECT ?label WHERE { ?species a nubbekg:Species ; rdfs:label ?label . FILTER NOT EXISTS { ?species skos:notation ?name } }
locationList: PREFIX onto: <http://nubbekg.aksw.org/ontology#> PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> SELECT ?label WHERE {?state a onto:State . OPTIONAL { ?state rdfs:label ?label }}
propertyList: PREFIX onto: <http://nubbekg.aksw.org/ontology#> PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> SELECT ?label WHERE { ?bioactivity a onto:Bioactivity . OPTIONAL { ?bioactivity rdfs:label ?label }}
nameList: PREFIX nubbekg: <http://nubbekg.aksw.org/ontology#> PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> SELECT ?commonName WHERE { ?compound a nubbekg:Compound ; nubbekg:commonName ?commonName . FILTER(BOUND(?commonName))}
metabolicList: PREFIX nubbekg: <http://nubbekg.aksw.org/ontology#> PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> SELECT ?label WHERE { ?p a nubbekg:Pathway ; rdfs:label ?label .}
